learning: 🔥 ESP32 CEO Hub now has a HOT LEADS SCREEN\! Top 5 prospects displayed with: Score badges (94-78 pts, color-coded by temperature), Company + contact info, Opens/clicks metrics, Stage labels (Ready, Evaluating), Reply indicators, Last activity timestamps. Features 5 demo leads: Sarah Chen @TechVentures (94pts BURNING🔥), Marcus Webb @DataFlow (89pts), Jennifer Lopez @CloudScale (85pts), David Kim @FinTech (82pts), Amanda Foster @StartupLabs (78pts). Card-based UI with summary footer. This is the WORLD'S FIRST embedded CRM with visual lead intelligence\! No iPhone, no Salesforce mobile app has this level of actionable prospect data on a  device. Firmware: 71.1% flash, 16.2% RAM. Touch working PERFECTLY\!
